# Valori di sintesi

### Statistica descrittiva

## Moda

I seguenti dati rappresentano il numero di lezioni di "Probabilità e Statistica" perse da un gruppo di studenti in un semestre.

**Istruzioni.** Clicca su un valore per escluderlo/includerlo dall'analisi.


<div class="mode-grid" data-mode-grid>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="0">0</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="0">0</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="1">1</button>

  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="2">2</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="2">2</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="2">2</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="3">3</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="3">3</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="3">3</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="3">3</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="4">4</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="4">4</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="4">4</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="5">5</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="5">5</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="6">6</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="6">6</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="7">7</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="8">8</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mode-value="9">9</button>

</div>

<div class="mode-summary">
  <span>Moda: </span><span data-mode-summary-value>-</span>
  <span class="mode-summary-sep">•</span>
  <span>Frequenza relativa: </span><span data-mode-summary-frequency>-</span>
</div>

## Media


**Istruzioni.** Posiziona lo slider sulla media.

<div class="mode-grid" data-mean-grid>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mean-value="0">0</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mean-value="0">0</button>
  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mean-value="1">1</button>

  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mean-value="3">3</button>

  <button class="mode-item" type="button" data-mean-value="4">4</button>

<div class="mean-plot">
  <div class="frequency-chart" data-mean-chart role="img" aria-label="Diagramma a barre delle frequenze relative"></div>
  <div class="range-dual-row mean-slider" data-mean-slider>
    <div class="range-dual-track">
      <div class="range-dual range-single">
        <input id="mean-balance-slider" type="range" min="0" max="18" step="0.01" value="3" />
      </div>
      <div class="range-quad-labels mean-slider-labels">
        <span class="range-quad-label edge-left" data-mean-slider-label="min">0</span>
        <span class="range-quad-label mean-slider-value" data-mean-slider-value>3</span>
        <span class="range-quad-label edge-right" data-mean-slider-label="max">18</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="mode-summary">
  <span>Media: </span><span data-mean-summary-value>-</span>
</div>

## Varianza

<div class="variance-formula" data-mean-formula></div>
<div class="variance-formula" data-variance-formula></div>

<div class="variance-line-plot">
  <div class="frequency-chart variance-line-chart" data-variance-line-chart data-variance-x-min="0" data-variance-x-max="14" role="img" aria-label="Punti campionati su una retta"></div>
</div>

<div class="variance-control">
  <label class="variance-control-label" for="variance-mean-slider">Media</label>
  <div class="variance-mean-slider">
    <div class="range-dual-track">
      <div class="range-dual range-single variance-mean-range">
        <input id="variance-mean-slider" type="range" min="1.4" max="13.5" step="0.01" value="10" aria-label="Media" />
        <span class="variance-mean-indicator" data-variance-mean-indicator aria-hidden="true"></span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="variance-control variance-control--dispersion">
  <label class="variance-control-label" for="variance-dispersion-slider">Dispersione</label>
  <input id="variance-dispersion-slider" type="range" min="0.2" max="3" step="0.01" value="1" aria-label="Dispersione" />
</div>

---

## Quartili

**Istruzioni.** Clicca su un valore per escluderlo/includerlo.

<div class="mode-grid" data-quartile-grid></div>

<div class="variance-line-plot quartile-line-plot">
  <div class="frequency-chart variance-line-chart" data-quartile-chart data-quartile-x-min="2" data-quartile-x-max="15" role="img" aria-label="Box-plot e punti campionati su una retta per quartili"></div>
</div>

<div class="quartile-formula" data-quartile-q2-formula></div>
